input_text: Kos rawatan haiwan peliharaan pun mahal gila sekarang. Vet charge RM500 untuk check up biasa. Macam mana orang biasa nak jaga pet?
reason: Pet veterinary costs becoming prohibitively expensive for regular checkups.
suggested_rewrite: Kos rawatan veterinar memang meningkat. Pertimbangkan insurans haiwan peliharaan atau klinik veterinar universiti yang menawarkan perkhidmatan pada kos lebih rendah.

input_text: Wifi free yang kerajaan provide kat taman pun slow gila. Buka Google pun loading forever. Lepas tu kena log in setiap 30 minit.
reason: Government free WiFi at parks extremely slow with frequent re-login requirement.
suggested_rewrite: WiFi percuma kerajaan perlu dinaik taraf kecekapannya. Log masuk berulang boleh diperbaiki dengan sesi yang lebih panjang.

input_text: Apartment corridor lights always off. Walking to my unit in total darkness every night. Falling hazard for elderly.
reason: Dark apartment corridors creating falling hazard especially for elderly residents.
suggested_rewrite: Corridor lighting is a basic safety requirement. Report to building management and if unresolved, escalate to the Commissioner of Buildings.

input_text: 学校的空调费要学生自己出。每月50块。上学都变成一种经济负担了。
reason: Students charged monthly for classroom air conditioning, hidden education cost.
suggested_rewrite: 学校设施费用应该透明且合理。如果额外收费过高，家长可以通过家教协会与学校协商。

input_text: Nak claim kad jaminan hayat pun kena hantar surat berdaftar. Dalam zaman email ni masih nak guna pos. Outdated.
reason: Life insurance claims requiring registered mail in the email age.
suggested_rewrite: Syarikat insurans perlu memodenkan proses tuntutan dengan menerima permohonan dalam talian. BNM boleh menggalakkan insurans digital.

input_text: The pedestrian bridge near my house has no roof and no lighting. During rain and at night, nobody uses it because it's unsafe.
reason: Pedestrian bridge without roof or lighting making it unusable in rain or at night.
suggested_rewrite: Pedestrian bridges should include basic amenities like roofing and lighting. Request upgrades through your local councilor's office.

input_text: Sampah dari pasar malam bertaburan merata lepas diorang balik. Kena tunggu esok baru cleaner datang. Bau semalaman.
reason: Night market garbage left overnight until morning cleanup, stinking all night.
suggested_rewrite: Peniaga pasar malam perlu membersihkan kawasan masing-masing sebelum balik. PBT boleh mengenakan syarat pembersihan sebagai sebahagian daripada lesen.

input_text: 每次去修电脑都被宰。说是主板坏了要换，其实只是需要重装系统。
reason: Computer repair shops diagnosing expensive hardware issues when simple software fix needed.
suggested_rewrite: 修电脑前可以先在网上搜索相关问题。如果怀疑被过度收费，寻求第二意见或到信誉好的维修中心。

input_text: Gaji pembantu rumah asing pun naik tapi maid agency caj lebih mahal lagi. Commission beribu-ribu. Siapa yang untung? Agency la.
reason: Maid agency profiting with high commissions while wages also rise, middleman exploitation.
suggested_rewrite: Kos agensi pembantu rumah perlu dikawal selia. Bandingkan kadar antara agensi berlesen dan semak had komisen yang dibenarkan.

input_text: Public toilet at tourist spots charges RM2 but still dirty. Even tourist areas can't maintain basic hygiene. Embarrassing.
reason: Tourist area paid toilets still dirty, national embarrassment concern.
suggested_rewrite: Tourist destination toilets should reflect Malaysian hospitality standards. Report poor facilities to Tourism Malaysia and the local council.

input_text: இந்த பகுதியின் பேருந்து சேவை மிகவும் குறைவு. காலையில் ஒரு பேருந்தும் மாலையில் ஒரு பேருந்தும் மட்டுமே.
reason: Extremely limited bus service with only one morning and one evening bus.
suggested_rewrite: பேருந்து சேவை அதிகரிக்கப்பட வேண்டும். குறைந்தபட்ச சேவை நிலைகளை நிர்ணயிக்க போக்குவரத்து ஆணையத்திடம் கோரிக்கை வைக்கலாம்.

input_text: Makcik jual kuih tepi jalan kena halau setiap hari tapi food truck dengan permit boleh park merata. Tak adil la.
reason: Street food vendor chased away while food trucks with permits park freely, unfair treatment.
suggested_rewrite: Proses mendapatkan permit penjaja perlu dipermudahkan untuk peniaga kecil. Skim bantuan boleh membantu mereka mendapatkan lesen sah.

input_text: These online lenders charge 300% annual interest rate. Legal loan shark. Government allows this predatory lending.
reason: Predatory online lending with extreme interest rates, calling it legal loan sharking.
suggested_rewrite: Avoid unregulated online lenders. Only borrow from licensed financial institutions. Report predatory lenders to BNM and police.

input_text: 每次投诉噪音问题，物业管理就说这是'正常生活噪音'。凌晨三点的钻墙声算正常吗？
reason: 3am drilling noise dismissed as normal by building management.
suggested_rewrite: 凌晨施工违反噪音管制规定。保留证据（录音和时间戳）向环境部门投诉。

input_text: Nak guna surau kat shopping mall pun kena cari macam main treasure hunt. Sign board pun takde. Mall design fail.
reason: Difficulty finding prayer rooms in malls with no signage, religious facility access.
suggested_rewrite: Pusat membeli-belah perlu menyediakan papan tanda yang jelas ke surau dan memastikan kemudahan solat mudah diakses.

input_text: Factory next to residential area releases foul smell every night. Morning wake up and the whole area stinks. Quality of life zero.
reason: Factory nocturnal emissions creating foul odor in residential area.
suggested_rewrite: Industrial odor emissions affecting residential areas should be reported to DOE with specific dates and times. Factories must comply with emission standards.

input_text: Jadual kutipan sampah tak konsisten. Kadang datang Isnin, kadang Rabu. Macam mana nak rancang?
reason: Inconsistent garbage collection schedule making it impossible to plan.
suggested_rewrite: Jadual kutipan sampah yang tidak konsisten perlu dilaporkan kepada SWCorp. Tuntut jadual tetap yang boleh dipercayai.

input_text: 这个公寓的电梯按钮经常失灵。按了没反应，或者去错楼层。什么时候才修好？
reason: Elevator buttons malfunctioning going to wrong floors, maintenance neglect.
suggested_rewrite: 电梯按钮故障是安全隐患。立即向物业管理报告并要求进行紧急维修。

input_text: Rumah flat kos rendah dah macam nak roboh. Ceiling retak, tangga goyang. Tapi penghuni still kena bayar sewa. Tak safe langsung.
reason: Low-cost flat structurally unsafe with cracked ceiling and shaking stairs but rent still charged.
suggested_rewrite: Bangunan yang tidak selamat secara struktur perlu diperiksa dan dibaiki segera. Laporkan kepada Jabatan Bomba dan PBT untuk penilaian keselamatan.

input_text: No public phone charging stations in this city. Everyone depends on phone but when battery dies, you're stuck.
reason: Lack of public phone charging infrastructure in a smartphone-dependent society.
suggested_rewrite: Public charging stations in high-traffic areas would be a useful modern amenity. Carry a portable charger as a personal backup.

input_text: கடற்கரையில் குப்பைகள் நிறைந்துள்ளன. சுற்றுலாத்துறை மேம்படுத்த வேண்டும் என்கிறார்கள் ஆனால் சுத்தம் செய்வதில்லை.
reason: Littered beaches contradicting tourism promotion claims.
suggested_rewrite: கடற்கரை தூய்மை சுற்றுலாவிற்கு அவசியம். வழக்கமான கடற்கரை சுத்திகரிப்பு நடவடிக்கைகளும் கடுமையான குப்பை தண்டனைகளும் தேவை.

input_text: Aku perasan harga barang kat kedai runcit ni lain daripada harga kat tag. Sentiasa lebih mahal kat kaunter. Tipu je kerja diorang.
reason: Grocery store charging more at counter than tagged prices, consumer deception.
suggested_rewrite: Harga di kaunter mesti sama dengan yang dinyatakan di rak. Ambil gambar tag harga dan laporkan perbezaan kepada KPDNHEP.

input_text: Government built a park but no maintenance budget allocated. Within 6 months it became a dumping ground. Planning fail.
reason: New park abandoned within 6 months due to no maintenance budget allocation.
suggested_rewrite: Public facility development must include maintenance budgets. Community adoption programs can supplement government upkeep.

input_text: 每次去车检都被要求做不必要的维修。不做的话就不给通过。这是什么制度？
reason: Vehicle inspection centers requiring unnecessary repairs to pass inspection, extortion.
suggested_rewrite: 如果怀疑车检中心要求不必要的维修，可以到其他授权中心寻求第二意见。向JPJ举报不正当行为。

input_text: Kedai fotostat kat kampung dah tutup. Sekarang nak fotokopi apa-apa kena pergi bandar 20km jauhnya. Orang tua macam mana?
reason: Rural photocopy shop closed forcing 20km trip to town, elderly access issue.
suggested_rewrite: Perkhidmatan asas di luar bandar perlu dikekalkan. Pusat komuniti boleh menyediakan kemudahan fotokopi dan percetakan untuk penduduk.
